info.title: Backend API
info.description: A simple ASP.NET Core Web API template with best practices for building scalable and maintainable applications.

post.summary:
Authenticate with email and password. Returns a JWT access token in the body
and sets a HttpOnly refresh token cookie.

Issue a new JWT access token using the HttpOnly refresh token cookie.
Performs refresh token rotation.
Revoke the refresh token and clear the cookie. Returns 204 No Content.

get.summary: Return the current authenticated user's profile. Requires a valid JWT bearer token.

LoginResultDto.description:
Returned from the service after successful authentication.
RawRefreshToken is an internal field used to pass the plaintext token
to the controller so it can set the HttpOnly cookie — it is never
serialized in the API response body.
